response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the entire video to determine content and check for vocal music. 2. Confirmed the video is a promotional loop with instrumental background music. 3. There are no vocals, therefore no lyrics to search for. 4. Structured the scenes based on the main visual transitions (initial messages, 'Opening Soon' screen, 'Attention' notice). 5. Set 'contains_vocal_music' to false and null for all music-related fields.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional montage for the 'hololive LIVE 2026 First MISSION' concert. It consists of a continuous loop of congratulatory and promotional messages displayed over a consistent, instrumental, chiptune-style electronic background track. There are no vocals in the entire video.

scenes.description: The video begins with a montage of various congratulatory messages and promotional art for the 'hololive LIVE 2026 First MISSION' concert, displayed over a continuous instrumental background track.
The video transitions to a main promotional screen featuring four characters and the concert title 'First MISSION', with the 'Opening Soon' message. The same instrumental background track continues.
The video displays an 'ATTENTION' screen with safety notices for the audience, followed by a return to the loop of congratulatory messages. The background instrumental continues throughout.
